SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.CPU

Class DuckCPU

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.CPU.DuckCPU
public class DuckCPU extends Object
Emulates the Game Boy CPU core and its register state.

The class owns the LR35902 register file, interrupt state, HALT behaviour, and the fetch-decode-execute flow used by the main emulation loop.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    DuckCPU.CpuState
     
    static enum 
    DuckCPU.Flag
    CPU status flags stored in the upper nibble of register `F`.
    static enum 
    DuckCPU.Interrupt
    Interrupt sources exposed through the IF and IE registers.
    static enum 
    DuckCPU.Register
    Identifies 8-bit and 16-bit CPU registers used by the decoder and instruction helpers.

  • Constructor Details

    • DuckCPU

      public DuckCPU(DuckMemory memory, DuckEmulation emulation, ROM rom)
      Creates a CPU bound to the active memory bus, emulator controller, and cartridge metadata.
      Parameters:
      memory - memory bus
      emulation - owning emulator controller
      rom - loaded cartridge

  • Method Details

    • Fetch

      public void Fetch()
      Fetches the next opcode byte from memory.

    • Decode

      public void Decode()
      Decodes the currently fetched opcode into an executable handler.

    • Execute

      public int Execute()
      Executes the current instruction and then services delayed IME and interrupt entry logic.
      Returns:
      T-cycles consumed by the instruction, plus interrupt entry if one is taken

    • SetRegister

      public void SetRegister(DuckCPU.Register register, int value)
      Writes an 8-bit value to a register or the byte addressed by `HL`.
      Parameters:
      register - target register
      value - value to store

      Reads an 8-bit value from a register or the byte addressed by `HL`.

      Returns:
      register value

      value - value to store

      Returns whether the CPU is stopped.

    • SetHaltBug

      public void SetHaltBug()
      Arms the HALT bug for the next fetch.

    • IsHaltBug

      public boolean IsHaltBug()
      Returns whether the HALT bug is pending.
      Returns:
      `true` if the next fetch should skip the PC increment

    • ScheduleEnableInterrupts

      public void ScheduleEnableInterrupts()
      Schedules IME to be enabled after the next instruction completes.

      public void DisableInterrupts()
      Disables interrupts immediately.

      Enables interrupts immediately.

      Sets the IF bit for an interrupt source.
      Parameters:
      interrupt - interrupt to request

    • IsInterruptMasterEnable

      public boolean IsInterruptMasterEnable()
      Returns the current IME state.
      Returns:
      `true` if interrupts are globally enabled

    • CaptureState

      public DuckCPU.CpuState CaptureState()
      Captures the live CPU register and interrupt state.
      Returns:
      CPU state snapshot

      Restores the CPU register and interrupt state from a snapshot.
      Parameters:
      state - CPU snapshot to restore
